overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring the dimly lit interior of a primitive woven hut. The character moves through the rustic dwelling examining simple furnishings and storage areas before approaching a cloth-covered exit doorway.

events.description: character enters the dimly lit hut from the bright exterior, transitioning from natural to low light
character turns right to explore the side of the dwelling with raised wooden platforms

agents.ego_description: walking into the primitive dwelling and examining the interior layout with wooden bed platforms and storage

entered.detail: rough-hewn wooden doorway frame with bright exterior light visible behind
walls constructed of woven branches and reeds with mud plaster
thick wooden structural post supporting the roof
raised sleeping platform made of wooden logs and planks
woven baskets containing goods placed on the dirt floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit primitive hut through a rough wooden doorway. The interior features woven reed walls and a dirt floor, with raised wooden bed platforms on the right side and storage baskets visible on the left. The camera follows closely as the character explores the entrance chamber.

events.description: character turns left to examine the storage area containing baskets and pottery
character approaches the tattered cloth partition at the rear of the dwelling

agents.ego_description: moving through the hut's interior examining storage areas and wooden structures, turning toward the back wall

entered.detail: tattered beige cloth hanging as a room divider or door covering
stack of cut wooden logs and branches for construction or fuel
earthenware bowls and containers on the floor

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the hut, the character explores the storage area containing pottery bowls and woven baskets. Wooden logs are piled against the right wall. The character approaches a tattered cloth partition hanging at the rear of the chamber, with the entrance now passed behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: hut rear partition and exit area

events.description: tattered cloth partition temporarily fills the frame as character moves past it
bright exterior light becomes visible through the exit doorway ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the cloth partition and moving toward the exit doorway with increasing exterior light visible

entered.detail: wooden doorway frame leading outside with bright daylight visible beyond
worn fabric hanging beside the exit opening

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the tattered cloth partition at the rear of the hut, revealing an exit doorway ahead. Bright exterior light streams through the opening, contrasting with the dim interior. The camera follows as the character approaches the woven wooden door frame leading outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the dim, rustic interior of a primitive hut that gradually leads toward a bright exterior exit. It begins as the character enters through a rough wooden doorway into a chamber with woven reed walls, dirt floors, and raised wooden bed platforms. As the camera moves deeper into the dwelling, the scene shifts toward a storage area filled with pottery bowls and woven baskets, passing piled wooden logs along the right wall. The perspective then pushes forward toward a tattered cloth partition at the rear of the room, moving past the fabric to reveal a stark contrast in lighting. Finally, the camera follows the character as they approach a woven wooden door frame where brilliant exterior light streams into the dark interior.
